\
@font-face \{\
  font-family: 'Neuropol';\
  src: url('data:font/otf;base64,') format('opentype');\
  font-weight: normal;\
  font-style: normal;\
  font-display: swap;\
\}\
\
*, *::before, *::after \{ box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; \}\
\
:root \{\
  --bg:       #0d0d0f;\
  --surface:  #141416;\
  --card:     #1a1a1e;\
  --card2:    #1f1f25;\
  --border:   rgba(255,255,255,0.07);\
  --blue:     #2563EB;\
  --blue-d:   rgba(37,99,235,0.13);\
  --blue-b:   rgba(37,99,235,0.3);\
  --violet:   #9E6EF1;\
  --mint:     #00FFCC;\
  --text:     #E2E8F0;\
  --muted:    #64748B;\
  --dim:      #2a2a35;\
  --success:  #22c55e;\
  --gold:     #F59E0B;\
  --red:      #ef4444;\
  --fb: 'Inter', sans-serif;\
  --max: 1440px;\
  --pad: 64px;\
\}\
\
html, body \{ background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); font-family: var(--fb); font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; overflow-x: hidden; min-width: 1280px; \}\
::-webkit-scrollbar \{ width: 5px; \}\
::-webkit-scrollbar-track \{ background: var(--bg); \}\
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb \{ background: var(--blue); border-radius: 3px; \}\
\
\
/* \uc0\u9472 \u9472 \u9472  PROMO BAR \u9472 \u9472 \u9472  */\
.promo-bar \{\
  background: #0a0a0c;\
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(37,99,235,0.2);\
  padding: 7px 0; position: relative; overflow: hidden;\
\}\
.promo-bar::before \{\
  content: '';\
  position: absolute; inset: 0;\
  background: repeating-linear-gradient(\
    90deg,\
    transparent,\
    transparent 200px,\
    rgba(37,99,235,0.04) 200px,\
    rgba(37,99,235,0.04) 201px\
  );\
\}\
.promo-inner \{\
  max-width: var(--max); margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 var(--pad);\
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;\
  position: relative;\
\}\
.promo-slides-wrap \{ display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative; min-height: 22px; overflow: hidden; \}\
.promo-slide \{\
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;\
  font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--muted);\
  text-align: center;\
  opacity: 0;\
  position: absolute;\
  pointer-events: none;\
  transition: opacity 0.6s ease;\
  white-space: nowrap;\
\}\
.promo-slide.active \{\
  opacity: 1;\
  position: relative;\
  pointer-events: auto;\
  transition: opacity 0.6s ease;\
\}\
.promo-tag \{\
  background: rgba(37,99,235,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(37,99,235,0.3);\
  border-radius: 100px; padding: 1px 10px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700;\
  color: var(--blue); white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: .04em;\
\}\
.promo-cta \{\
  color: var(--mint); font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer;\
  font-size: 11px; white-space: nowrap; text-decoration: none;\
  transition: opacity .18s; letter-spacing: .02em;\
\}\
.promo-cta:hover \{ opacity: .75; \}\
.promo-close \{\
  position: absolute; left: var(--pad); top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%);\
  background: none; border: none; color: var(--muted);\
  cursor: pointer; font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 6px;\
  transition: color .18s; line-height: 1;\
\}\
.promo-close:hover \{ color: var(--text); \}\
\
/* (topbar removed) */\
.topbar \{\
  background: #0a0a0c;\
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);\
  padding: 6px 0;\
  font-size: 12px;\
  color: var(--muted);\
\}\
.topbar-inner \{\
  max-width: var(--max);\
  margin: 0 auto;\
  padding: 0 var(--pad);\
  display: flex;\
  justify-content: space-between;\
  align-items: center;\
\}\
.topbar-left \{ display: flex; gap: 24px; align-items: center; \}\
.topbar-item \{ display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; \}\
.topbar-item svg \{ width: 13px; height: 13px; stroke: var(--mint); \}\
.topbar-right \{ display: flex; gap: 20px; align-items: center; \}\
.topbar-right a \{ color: var(--muted); cursor: pointer; transition: color .18s; \}\
.topbar-right a:hover \{ color: var(--text); \}\
\
/* \uc0\u9472 \u9472 \u9472  MAIN NAV \u9472 \u9472 \u9472  */\
nav \{\
  position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 999;\
  background: rgba(13,13,15,0.96);\
  backdrop-filter: blur(20px);\
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);\
\}\
.nav-inner \{\
  max-width: var(--max); margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 var(--pad);\
  height: 68px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px;\
\}\
.nav-logo \{ display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; text-decoration: none; flex-shrink: 0; \}\
.nav-logo-icon \{ width: 30px; height: 36px; \}\
.nav-logo-text \{ font-family: 'Neuropol', sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 400; color: #fff; letter-spacing: 0.05em; white-space: nowrap; \}\
\
.nav-search \{\
  flex: 1; max-width: 580px;\
  display: flex; align-items: center;\
  background: var(--surface);\
  border: 1.5px solid var(--border);\
  border-radius: 10px;\
  overflow: hidden;\
  transition: border-color .18s;\
\}\
.nav-search:focus-within \{ border-color: var(--blue); \}\
.nav-search input \{\
  flex: 1; background: none; border: none; outline: none;\
  padding: 10px 16px; color: var(--text); font-family: var(--fb); font-size: 14px;\
\}\
.nav-search input::placeholder \{ color: var(--muted); \}\
.nav-search-btn \{\
  background: var(--blue); border: none; color: #fff;\
  padding: 0 16px; height: 100%; cursor: pointer;\
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;\
  transition: background .18s; flex-shrink: 0; border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;\
\}\
.nav-search-btn:hover \{ background: #1d4ed8; \}\
.nav-search-btn svg \{ width: 17px; height: 17px; \}\
\
.nav-actions \{ display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; margin-right: auto; \}\
.nav-actions \{ display: flex; gap: 6px; align-items: center; margin-right: auto; \}\
\
.nav-icon-btn \{\
  background: none; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px;\
  color: var(--muted); width: 36px; height: 36px; cursor: pointer;\
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;\
  transition: all .18s; flex-shrink: 0; position: relative;\
\}\
.nav-icon-btn svg \{ width: 16px; height: 16px; stroke-width: 1.8; \}\
.nav-icon-btn:hover \{ border-color: var(--blue); color: var(--text); background: rgba(37,99,235,0.06); \}\
.nav-icon-btn.active \{ border-color: var(--blue); color: var(--blue); background: rgba(37,99,235,0.08); \}\
.nav-icon-btn::after \{\
  content: attr(data-tip);\
  position: absolute; bottom: -30px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);\
  background: #1a1a1e; color: var(--text); font-size: 11px; font-family: var(--fb);\
  padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 5px; white-space: nowrap;\
  opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transition: opacity .15s;\
  border: 1px solid var(--border); z-index: 100;\
\}\
.nav-icon-btn:hover::after \{ opacity: 1; \}\
\
.nav-divider \{ width: 1px; height: 22px; background: var(--border); flex-shrink: 0; \}\
\
.nav-lang-btn \{\
  background: none; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px;\
  color: var(--muted); padding: 0 10px; height: 36px; cursor: pointer;\
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;\
  font-family: var(--fb); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600;\
  transition: all .18s; flex-shrink: 0;\
\}\
.nav-lang-btn:hover \{ border-color: var(--blue); color: var(--text); \}\
.nav-lang-btn svg \{ width: 13px; height: 13px; \}\
\
.nav-user-btn \{\
  background: none; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px;\
  color: var(--text); padding: 0 14px; height: 36px; cursor: pointer;\
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px;\
  font-family: var(--fb); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500;\
  transition: all .18s; flex-shrink: 0; white-space: nowrap;\
\}\
.nav-user-btn svg \{ width: 15px; height: 15px; \}\
.nav-user-btn:hover \{ border-color: var(--blue); color: var(--blue); background: rgba(37,99,235,0.06); \}\
\
.nav-cart \{\
  background: var(--blue); border: none; border-radius: 8px;\
  color: #fff; padding: 0 16px; height: 36px; cursor: pointer;\
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;\
  font-family: var(--fb); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600;\
  transition: all .18s; flex-shrink: 0; white-space: nowrap;\
  position: relative;\
\}\
.nav-cart:hover \{ background: #1d4ed8; \}\
.nav-cart svg \{ width: 16px; height: 16px; \}\
.cart-count \{\
  background: #ef4444; color: #fff; border-radius: 10px;\
  min-width: 22px; height: 22px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700;\
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;\
  padding: 0 5px; flex-shrink: 0;\
  position: absolute; top: -9px; left: -9px;\
  border: 2px solid var(--bg);\
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(239,68,68,0.3);\
\}\
\
/* \uc0\u9472 \u9472 \u9472  CATEGORY NAV BAR \u9472 \u9472 \u9472  */\
.cat-nav \{\
  background: var(--surface);\
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);\
  position: sticky; top: 68px; z-index: 998;\
\}\
.cat-nav-inner \{\
  max-width: var(--max); margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 var(--pad);\
  display: flex; align-items: stretch; justify-content: center; gap: 0;\
  height: 46px; overflow: hidden;\
\}\
.cat-nav-item \{\
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px;\
  padding: 0 16px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500;\
  color: var(--muted); cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap;\
  border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;\
  transition: all .18s; position: relative;\
\}\
.cat-nav-item svg \{ width: 14px; height: 14px; \}\
.cat-nav-item:hover \{ color: var(--text); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); \}\
.cat-nav-item.active \{ color: #fff; border-bottom-color: var(--blue); \}\
.cat-nav-item.has-drop:hover .cat-dropdown \{ display: block; \}\
.cat-nav-divider \{ width: 1px; background: var(--border); margin: 8px 0; flex-shrink: 0; \}\
.cat-nav-all \{\
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 0 18px;\
  font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--blue);\
  cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap;\
  border-left: 1px solid var(--border);\
\}\
.cat-nav-all svg \{ width: 14px; height: 14px; \}\
\
/* \uc0\u9472 \u9472 \u9472  HERO \u9472 \u9472 \u9472  */\
.hero \{\
  position: relative; overflow: hidden;\
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);\
\}\
.hero-inner \{\
  max-width: var(--max); margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 var(--pad);\
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 380px;\
  gap: 64px; min-height: 560px;\
\}\
/* grid/glow bg */\
.hero-bg \{\
  position: absolute; inset: 0;\
  background-image:\
    linear-gradient(rgba(37,99,235,0.035) 1px, transparent 1px),\
    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(37,99,235,0.035) 1px, transparent 1px);\
  background-size: 48px 48px;\
  pointer-events: none;\
\}\
.hero-glow \{\
  position: absolute; top: -150px; right: 20%;\
  width: 700px; height: 700px;\
  background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(37,99,235,0.12) 0%, rgba(158,110,241,0.04) 40%, transparent 68%);\
  pointer-events: none;\
\}\
\
/* Hero LEFT - slides */\
.hero-slides \{\
  position: relative; z-index: 1;\
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center;\
  padding: 64px 0;\
  min-height: 380px;\
\}\
.hero-slide \{\
  opacity: 0;\
  position: absolute;\
  top: 64px;\
  right: 0; left: 0;\
  pointer-events: none;\
  transition: opacity 0.65s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);\
\}\
.hero-slide.active \{\
  opacity: 1;\
  position: relative;\
  top: 0;\
  pointer-events: auto;\
  transition: opacity 0.65s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);\
\}\
\
.hero-eyebrow \{\
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;\
  background: rgba(0,255,204,0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,204,0.18);\
  border-radius: 100px; padding: 5px 16px; font-size: 12px;\
  font-weight: 500; color: var(--mint); margin-bottom: 24px; width: fit-content;\
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;\
\}\
.hero-eyebrow-dot \{ width: 6px; height: 6px; background: var(--mint); border-radius: 50%; animation: pulse 2s infinite; flex-shrink: 0; \}\
@keyframes pulse \{ 0%,100%\{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)\} 50%\{opacity:.35;transform:scale(.7)\} \}\
\
.hero-title \{\
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 58px; font-weight: 800;\
  line-height: 1.1; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 20px;\
  letter-spacing: -0.025em;\
\}\
.hero-title strong \{ color: var(--blue); font-weight: 800; \}\
.hero-title em \{ color: var(--violet); font-style: normal; \}\
.hero-title .accent \{\
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--blue), var(--violet));\
  -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text;\
\}\
\
.hero-desc \{\
  font-size: 16px; color: var(--muted); max-width: 480px;\
  line-height: 1.75; margin-bottom: 32px; font-weight: 400;\
\}\
\
.hero-cta \{ display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; \}\
.btn-primary \{\
  background: var(--blue); color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 10px;\
  padding: 13px 26px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; font-family: var(--fb);\
  cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; transition: all .18s;\
  white-space: nowrap;\
\}\
.btn-primary:hover \{ background: #1d4ed8; transform: translateY(-1px); \}\
.btn-primary:active \{ transform: scale(.98); \}\
.btn-secondary \{\
  background: transparent; color: var(--text); border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);\
  border-radius: 10px; padding: 13px 26px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500;\
  font-family: var(--fb); cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center;\
  gap: 8px; transition: all .18s; white-space: nowrap;\
\}\
.btn-secondary:hover \{ border-color: var(--blue); color: var(--blue); background: rgba(37,99,235,0.06); \}\
.btn-primary svg, .btn-secondary svg \{ width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; \}\
\
.hero-stats \{\
  display: flex; gap: 32px; margin-top: 40px; padding-top: 32px;\
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);\
\}\
.stat-num \{ font-size: 26px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; line-height: 1; \}\
.stat-num span \{ color: var(--mint); \}\
.stat-lbl \{ font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 3px; \}\
\
/* Slide dots */\
.slide-dots \{ display: flex; gap: 7px; margin-top: 24px; align-items: center; \}\
.slide-dot \{ width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); cursor: pointer; transition: all .25s; border: none; padding: 0; \}\
.slide-dot.active \{ background: var(--blue); width: 22px; border-radius: 4px; \}\
.slide-dot:hover:not(.active) \{ background: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); \}\
\
/* Hero RIGHT - product card */\
.hero-product-panel \{\
  position: relative; z-index: 1;\
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;\
  padding: 48px 0 48px 32px;\
\}\
.hero-product-card \{\
  background: var(--card);\
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);\
  border-radius: 18px; padding: 24px; width: 100%; text-align: center;\
  position: relative; overflow: visible;\
  box-shadow: 0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);\
\}\
.hero-product-card::before \{\
  content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 1px;\
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--blue), var(--violet), var(--mint), transparent);\
  border-radius: 18px 18px 0 0;\
\}\
\
/* \uc0\u1490 \u1500 \u1493  \u1506 \u1491 \u1497 \u1503  \u1502 \u1488 \u1495 \u1493 \u1512 \u1497  \u1492 \u1499 \u1512 \u1496 \u1497 \u1505  */\
.hero-product-card::after \{\
  content: ''; position: absolute; inset: -20px; z-index: -1;\
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(37,99,235,0.08) 0%, transparent 70%);\
  border-radius: 40px;\
\}\
\
.hero-product-img \{\
  width: 100%; height: 180px; background: #0e0e12; border-radius: 10px;\
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;\
  margin-bottom: 16px; position: relative; overflow: hidden;\
\}\
.hero-product-img::after \{\
  content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0;\
  background: radial-gradient(circle at center, rgba(37,99,235,0.08) 0%, transparent 70%);\
\}\
.hero-product-img svg \{ width: 80px; height: 80px; stroke: var(--blue); stroke-width: 1.2; position: relative; z-index: 1; \}\
.hero-product-img-label \{\
  position: absolute; top: 10px; right: 10px; z-index: 2;\
  background: var(--blue); color: #fff; border-radius: 6px;\
  padding: 3px 9px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .04em;\
\}\
\
.hero-product-brand \{ font-size: 10px; color: var(--blue); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .1em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 5px; \}\
.hero-product-name \{ font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 10px; line-height: 1.4; \}\
.hero-product-rating \{ display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 12px; \}\
.hero-product-stars \{ color: var(--gold); font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 1px; \}\
.hero-product-rcount \{ font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); \}\
.hero-product-price-row \{ display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 8px; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; \}\
.hero-product-price \{ font-size: 26px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--mint); \}\
.hero-product-old \{ font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); text-decoration: line-through; \}\
.hero-product-discount \{\
  font-size: 11px; color: var(--success); font-weight: 700;\
  background: rgba(34,197,94,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.2);\
  border-radius: 5px; padding: 2px 7px;\
\}\
.hero-product-btn \{\
  background: var(--blue); color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 9px;\
  padding: 11px; width: 100%; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600;\
  font-family: var(--fb); cursor: pointer; display: flex;\
  align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; transition: all .18s;\
\}\
.hero-product-btn:hover \{ background: #1d4ed8; transform: translateY(-1px); \}\
.hero-product-btn svg \{ width: 15px; height: 15px; \}\
\
/* Float badges \'97 \uc0\u1489 \u1510 \u1491  \u1492 \u1499 \u1512 \u1496 \u1497 \u1505  */\
.hero-float-badge \{\
  position: absolute;\
  background: rgba(15,15,18,0.95);\
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);\
  border-radius: 10px; padding: 8px 14px;\
  animation: floatY 3.5s ease-in-out infinite;\
  backdrop-filter: blur(8px);\
  z-index: 10;\
\}\
.hero-float-badge.f1 \{ top: 20%; right: -80px; animation-delay: 0s; \}\
.hero-float-badge.f2 \{ bottom: 22%; left: -80px; animation-delay: 1.8s; \}\
@keyframes floatY \{ 0%,100%\{transform:translateY(0)\} 50%\{transform:translateY(-7px)\} \}\
.float-lbl \{ font-size: 10px; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 2px; \}\
.float-val \{ font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--mint); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; white-space: nowrap; \}\
.float-val svg \{ width: 12px; height: 12px; stroke: var(--mint); \}\
\
/* \uc0\u9472 \u9472 \u9472  BRANDS SECTION \u9472 \u9472 \u9472  */\
.brands-section \{ padding: 48px 0; background: var(--bg); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); \}\
.section-inner \{ max-width: var(--max); margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 var(--pad); \}\
.section-header \{ display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px; \}\
.section-title \{ font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; letter-spacing: -0.01em; \}\
.section-title span \{ color: var(--blue); \}\
.section-link \{ color: var(--muted); font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; margin-right: auto; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; transition: color .18s; \}\
.section-link:hover \{ color: var(--blue); \}\
.section-link svg \{ width: 14px; height: 14px; \}\
\
.brands-grid \{ display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(6, 1fr); gap: 14px; \}\
.brand-card \{\
  background: var(--card);\
  border: 1px solid var(--border);\
  border-radius: 12px;\
  padding: 14px 12px;\
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;\
  gap: 8px; cursor: pointer;\
  transition: all .2s;\
  text-align: center;\
\}\
.brand-card:hover \{ border-color: rgba(37,99,235,0.4); background: rgba(37,99,235,0.05); transform: translateY(-2px); \}\
.brand-logo-wrap \{ width: 100%; height: 40px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; \}\
.brand-img \{ height: 32px; width: auto; max-width: 80px; object-fit: contain; opacity: 0.65; transition: opacity .2s; filter: grayscale(20%); \}\
.brand-card:hover .brand-img \{ opacity: 1; filter: grayscale(0%); \}\
.brand-name \{ font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--muted); letter-spacing: .06em; text-transform: uppercase; \}\
.brand-count \{ font-size: 10px; color: var(--dim); \}\
\
/* \uc0\u9472 \u9472 \u9472  BEST SELLERS \u9472 \u9472 \u9472  */\
.bestsellers-section \{ padding: 48px 0; background: var(--surface); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); \}\
.products-row \{ display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr); gap: 18px; \}\
.pc \{\
  background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 14px;\
  overflow: hidden; cursor: pointer; transition: all .22s;\
  position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column;\
\}\
.pc:hover \{ border-color: rgba(37,99,235,0.45); transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(37,99,235,0.1); \}\
.pc-rank \{\
  position: absolute; top: 10px; right: 10px; z-index: 2;\
  width: 26px; height: 26px; background: var(--blue); color: #fff;\
  border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;\
  font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700;\
\}\
.pc-rank.gold \{ background: #F59E0B; \}\
.pc-rank.silver \{ background: #94a3b8; \}\
.pc-rank.bronze \{ background: #c97c3a; \}\
.pc-img \{\
  height: 170px; background: #111115; display: flex; align-items: center;\
  justify-content: center; position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: background .25s;\
\}\
.pc:hover .pc-img \{ background: #14101f; \}\
.pc-img svg \{ width: 72px; height: 72px; stroke: var(--blue); stroke-width: 1.2; \}\
.pc-badges \{ position: absolute; top: 10px; left: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; \}\
.badge \{ display: inline-block; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 5px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .04em; \}\
.b-sale \{ background: var(--red); color: #fff; \}\
.b-new  \{ background: rgba(0,255,204,0.1); color: var(--mint); border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,204,0.25); \}\
.pc-body \{ padding: 14px 16px 16px; flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; \}\
.pc-brand \{ font-size: 10px; color: var(--blue); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .08em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px; \}\
.pc-name \{ font-size: 13px; color: var(--text); font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 8px; line-height: 1.4; flex: 1; \}\
.pc-rating \{ display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; margin-bottom: 10px; \}\
.pc-stars \{ color: var(--gold); font-size: 12px; \}\
.pc-rcount \{ font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); \}\
.pc-prices \{ display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; \}\
.pc-price \{ font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--mint); \}\
.pc-old \{ font-size: 12px; color: var(--dim); text-decoration: line-through; \}\
.pc-disc \{ font-size: 11px; color: var(--success); font-weight: 600; \}\
.pc-add \{\
  background: var(--blue-d); border: 1px solid var(--blue-b); border-radius: 8px;\
  color: var(--blue); padding: 9px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600;\
  font-family: var(--fb); cursor: pointer; width: 100%; display: flex;\
  align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 7px; transition: all .18s;\
\}\
.pc-add svg \{ width: 14px; height: 14px; \}\
.pc-add:hover \{ background: var(--blue); color: #fff; \}\
\
/* \uc0\u9472 \u9472 \u9472  DEAL BANNER \u9472 \u9472 \u9472  */\
.deal-banner \{\
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0a1628 0%, #0e0e20 55%, #091318 100%);\
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(37,99,235,0.2); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(37,99,235,0.2);\
  padding: 0;\
  position: relative; overflow: hidden;\
\}\
/* \uc0\u1490 \u1512 \u1491 \u1497 \u1488 \u1504 \u1496  \u1499 \u1502 \u1493  \u1492 -hero */\
.deal-banner::before \{\
  content: '';\
  position: absolute; inset: 0;\
  background:\
    radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 50%, rgba(37,99,235,0.12) 0%, transparent 60%),\
    radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 50%, rgba(158,110,241,0.08) 0%, transparent 60%);\
  pointer-events: none;\
\}\
/* \uc0\u1511 \u1493  \u1490 \u1512 \u1491 \u1497 \u1488 \u1504 \u1496  \u1489 \u1512 \u1488 \u1513  */\
.deal-banner::after \{\
  content: '';\
  position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 1px;\
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--blue), var(--violet), transparent);\
\}\
.deal-inner \{\
  max-width: var(--max); margin: 0 auto; padding: 24px var(--pad);\
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 28px;\
  position: relative; z-index: 1;\
\}\
.deal-badge \{\
  background: rgba(239,68,68,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.3);\
  border-radius: 7px; padding: 5px 14px;\
  font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: #ef4444;\
  letter-spacing: .1em; text-transform: uppercase; flex-shrink: 0; white-space: nowrap;\
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;\
\}\
.deal-badge svg \{ width: 13px; height: 13px; \}\
.deal-text \{ flex: 1; \}\
.deal-title \{ font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; \}\
.deal-sub \{ font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 3px; \}\
\
/* \uc0\u1513 \u1506 \u1493 \u1503  \'97 \u1506 \u1491 \u1497 \u1503  \u1493 \u1511 \u1496 \u1503  */\
.countdown \{ display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; flex-shrink: 0; \}\
.cblock \{\
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);\
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);\
  border-radius: 6px; padding: 5px 10px;\
  text-align: center; min-width: 44px;\
\}\
.cnum \{ font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); line-height: 1; display: block; \}\
.clbl \{ font-size: 9px; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 2px; letter-spacing: .04em; \}\
.csep \{ font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--muted); padding-bottom: 10px; \}\
.deal-cta \{\
  background: var(--blue); color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 10px;\
  padding: 11px 22px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; font-family: var(--fb);\
  cursor: pointer; flex-shrink: 0; white-space: nowrap; display: flex;\
  align-items: center; gap: 7px; transition: all .18s;\
\}\
.deal-cta:hover \{ background: #1d4ed8; transform: translateY(-1px); \}\
.deal-cta svg \{ width: 15px; height: 15px; \}\
\
/* \uc0\u9472 \u9472 \u9472  GAMER CLUB \u9472 \u9472 \u9472  */\
.club-section \{ padding: 48px 0; background: var(--bg); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); \}\
.club-banner \{\
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0d1228 0%, #130d20 50%, #0d1a15 100%);\
  border: 1px solid rgba(158,110,241,0.25); border-radius: 20px;\
  padding: 40px 48px; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;\
  gap: 40px; align-items: center; position: relative; overflow: hidden;\
\}\
.club-banner::before \{\
  content: ''; position: absolute; top: -100px; left: -100px;\
  width: 400px; height: 400px;\
  background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(158,110,241,0.08) 0%, transparent 70%);\
\}\
.club-badge \{\
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;\
  background: rgba(158,110,241,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(158,110,241,0.3);\
  border-radius: 100px; padding: 5px 16px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--violet);\
  margin-bottom: 16px; width: fit-content;\
\}\
.club-badge svg \{ width: 13px; height: 13px; \}\
.club-title \{ font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 36px; font-weight: 800; color: #fff; line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 12px; \}\
.club-title span \{ color: var(--violet); \}\
.club-desc \{ font-size: 15px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 24px; max-width: 440px; \}\
.club-perks \{ display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 28px; \}\
.club-perk \{ display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-size: 14px; color: var(--text); \}\
.club-perk svg \{ width: 16px; height: 16px; stroke: var(--mint); flex-shrink: 0; \}\
.club-cta \{ display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: center; \}\
.club-btn-primary \{\
  background: var(--violet); color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 10px;\
  padding: 13px 28px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; font-family: var(--fb);\
  cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; transition: all .18s;\
\}\
.club-btn-primary:hover \{ background: #8b5cf6; \}\
.club-btn-primary svg \{ width: 16px; height: 16px; \}\
.club-btn-sec \{\
  background: transparent; color: var(--text); border: 1.5px solid var(--border);\
  border-radius: 10px; padding: 13px 24px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500;\
  font-family: var(--fb); cursor: pointer; transition: all .18s;\
\}\
.club-btn-sec:hover \{ border-color: var(--violet); color: var(--violet); \}\
.club-stats \{ display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 16px; \}\
.club-stat \{ background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border-radius: 14px; padding: 20px 16px; text-align: center; \}\
.club-stat-num \{ font-size: 32px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 4px; \}\
.club-stat-num span \{ color: var(--violet); \}\
.club-stat-lbl \{ font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); \}\
\
/* \uc0\u9472 \u9472 \u9472  POLICY BAR \u9472 \u9472 \u9472  */\
.policy-bar \{ background: var(--surface); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 22px 0; \}\
.policy-inner \{ max-width: var(--max); margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 var(--pad); display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 0; \}\
.policy-item \{\
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; padding: 0 24px;\
  border-right: 1px solid var(--border); cursor: pointer;\
\}\
.policy-item:first-child \{ padding-right: 24px; \}\
.policy-item:last-child \{ border-right: none; \}\
.policy-icon-wrap \{ width: 40px; height: 40px; background: var(--blue-d); border-radius: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; \}\
.policy-icon-wrap svg \{ width: 20px; height: 20px; stroke: var(--blue); \}\
.policy-title \{ font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 2px; \}\
.policy-desc \{ font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); \}\
\
/* \uc0\u9472 \u9472 \u9472  FOOTER \u9472 \u9472 \u9472  */\
footer \{ background: var(--surface); border-top: 1px solid var(--border); \}\
.footer-inner \{ max-width: var(--max); margin: 0 auto; padding: 48px var(--pad) 28px; \}\
.footer-grid \{ display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 56px; margin-bottom: 40px; \}\
.footer-brand-wrap \{ display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 14px; \}\
.footer-brand-icon \{ width: 28px; height: 34px; \}\
.footer-brand-text \{ font-family: 'Neuropol', sans-serif; font-size: 20px; color: #fff; letter-spacing: .05em; \}\
.footer-desc \{ font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.75; max-width: 280px; \}\
.footer-col-title \{ font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); letter-spacing: .09em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 16px; \}\
.footer-link \{ font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); cursor: pointer; padding: 4px 0; display: block; transition: color .18s; \}\
.footer-link:hover \{ color: var(--blue); \}\
.footer-bottom \{ border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding-top: 24px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; \}\
.footer-copy \{ font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); \}\
.footer-socials \{ display: flex; gap: 8px; \}\
.social-btn \{ width: 34px; height: 34px; background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; transition: all .18s; color: var(--muted); \}\
.social-btn svg \{ width: 14px; height: 14px; \}\
.social-btn:hover \{ border-color: var(--blue); color: var(--blue); \}\
\
/* \uc0\u9472 \u9472 \u9472  SEARCH SUGGESTIONS \u9472 \u9472 \u9472  */\
.search-suggestions \{\
  position: absolute; top: calc(100% + 4px); right: 0; left: 0;\
  background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 12px;\
  z-index: 1000; display: none; box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);\
  overflow: hidden;\
\}\
.nav-search-wrap \{ position: relative; flex: 1; max-width: 580px; \}\
.nav-search-wrap:focus-within .search-suggestions \{ display: block; \}\
.search-suggestion-item \{\
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 16px;\
  cursor: pointer; transition: background .15s; font-size: 13px;\
\}\
.search-suggestion-item:hover \{ background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); \}\
.search-sug-icon \{ width: 32px; height: 32px; background: var(--blue-d); border-radius: 7px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; \}\
.search-sug-icon svg \{ width: 16px; height: 16px; stroke: var(--blue); \}\
.search-sug-text \{ flex: 1; \}\
.search-sug-name \{ color: var(--text); font-weight: 500; \}\
.search-sug-cat \{ font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); \}\
.search-sug-price \{ color: var(--mint); font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; \}\
\
\
\
/* \uc0\u9472 \u9472 \u9472  LOGIN MODAL \u9472 \u9472 \u9472  */\
.modal-overlay \{\
  position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 9999;\
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.7);\
  backdrop-filter: blur(8px);\
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;\
  opacity: 0; pointer-events: none;\
  transition: opacity .25s ease;\
\}\
.modal-overlay.open \{\
  opacity: 1; pointer-events: auto;\
\}\
.modal \{\
  background: var(--card);\
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);\
  border-radius: 20px;\
  width: 100%; max-width: 420px;\
  padding: 36px;\
  position: relative;\
  transform: translateY(16px);\
  transition: transform .25s ease;\
  box-shadow: 0 32px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);\
\}\
.modal-overlay.open .modal \{\
  transform: translateY(0);\
\}\
/* \uc0\u1511 \u1493  \u1490 \u1512 \u1491 \u1497 \u1488 \u1504 \u1496  \u1489 \u1512 \u1488 \u1513  */\
.modal::before \{\
  content: '';\
  position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 1px;\
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--blue), var(--violet), transparent);\
  border-radius: 20px 20px 0 0;\
\}\
.modal-close \{\
  position: absolute; top: 16px; left: 16px;\
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border: none;\
  border-radius: 8px; width: 32px; height: 32px;\
  color: var(--muted); cursor: pointer;\
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;\
  transition: all .18s;\
\}\
.modal-close:hover \{ background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); color: var(--text); \}\
.modal-close svg \{ width: 16px; height: 16px; \}\
\
/* \uc0\u1500 \u1493 \u1490 \u1493  \u1489 \u1514 \u1493 \u1498  \u1492 \u1502 \u1493 \u1491 \u1500  */\
.modal-logo \{\
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;\
  justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 6px;\
\}\
.modal-logo-icon \{ width: 24px; height: 28px; \}\
.modal-logo-text \{ font-family: 'Neuropol', sans-serif; font-size: 18px; color: #fff; letter-spacing: .05em; \}\
\
.modal-subtitle \{ text-align: center; font-size: 13px; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 28px; \}\
\
/* Tabs */\
.modal-tabs \{\
  display: flex; background: var(--surface); border-radius: 10px;\
  padding: 3px; margin-bottom: 24px; gap: 3px;\
\}\
.modal-tab \{\
  flex: 1; padding: 8px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600;\
  font-family: var(--fb); border: none; background: none;\
  color: var(--muted); cursor: pointer; border-radius: 8px;\
  transition: all .18s;\
\}\
.modal-tab.active \{ background: var(--blue); color: #fff; \}\
\
/* Fields */\
.modal-field \{ margin-bottom: 14px; \}\
.modal-label \{ font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 6px; display: block; \}\
.modal-input \{\
  width: 100%; background: var(--surface);\
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 10px;\
  padding: 11px 14px; color: var(--text); font-family: var(--fb); font-size: 14px;\
  outline: none; transition: border-color .18s;\
\}\
.modal-input:focus \{ border-color: var(--blue); \}\
.modal-input::placeholder \{ color: var(--muted); \}\
\
.modal-forgot \{ font-size: 12px; color: var(--blue); cursor: pointer; float: left; margin-top: 6px; \}\
.modal-forgot:hover \{ opacity: .8; \}\
\
.modal-btn \{\
  width: 100%; background: var(--blue); color: #fff; border: none;\
  border-radius: 10px; padding: 13px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600;\
  font-family: var(--fb); cursor: pointer; margin-top: 20px;\
  transition: all .18s; display: flex; align-items: center;\
  justify-content: center; gap: 8px; clear: both;\
\}\
.modal-btn:hover \{ background: #1d4ed8; transform: translateY(-1px); \}\
.modal-btn svg \{ width: 16px; height: 16px; \}\
\
.modal-divider \{\
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;\
  margin: 20px 0; color: var(--muted); font-size: 12px;\
\}\
.modal-divider::before, .modal-divider::after \{\
  content: ''; flex: 1; height: 1px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07);\
\}\
\
/* \uc0\u1499 \u1508 \u1514 \u1493 \u1512 \u1497  OAuth */\
.modal-oauth \{ display: flex; gap: 10px; \}\
.modal-oauth-btn \{\
  flex: 1; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);\
  border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px; cursor: pointer;\
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px;\
  font-family: var(--fb); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text);\
  transition: all .18s;\
\}\
.modal-oauth-btn:hover \{ border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); \}\
.modal-oauth-btn svg \{ width: 16px; height: 16px; \}\
\
.modal-terms \{ font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); text-align: center; margin-top: 18px; line-height: 1.6; \}\
.modal-terms a \{ color: var(--blue); cursor: pointer; \}\
\
/* Register panel */\
.modal-panel \{ display: none; \}\
.modal-panel.active \{ display: block; \}\
\
/* \uc0\u9472 \u9472 \u9472  REVIEWS \u9472 \u9472 \u9472  */\
.reviews-section \{ padding: 56px 0; background: var(--bg); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); \}\
.reviews-grid \{ display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 16px; \}\
\
/* \uc0\u1499 \u1512 \u1496 \u1497 \u1505  \'97 \u1506 \u1491 \u1497 \u1503 , \u1500 \u1500 \u1488  border \u1489 \u1493 \u1500 \u1496  */\
.review-card \{\
  background: var(--surface);\
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);\
  border-radius: 14px;\
  padding: 22px 20px;\
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px;\
  transition: border-color .2s;\
  cursor: default;\
\}\
.review-card:hover \{ border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); \}\
\
/* \uc0\u1508 \u1505 \u1497 \u1511  \u1510 \u1497 \u1496 \u1493 \u1496  \u1506 \u1491 \u1497 \u1503  */\
.review-card::before \{\
  content: '"';\
  font-size: 48px; line-height: 0.5;\
  color: rgba(37,99,235,0.2);\
  font-family: Georgia, serif;\
  display: block;\
  margin-bottom: 4px;\
\}\
\
.review-top \{ display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; \}\
.review-avatar \{\
  width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0;\
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;\
  font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);\
  background: rgba(37,99,235,0.2);\
\}\
.review-info \{ flex: 1; \}\
.review-name \{ font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); \}\
.review-meta \{ font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 1px; \}\
.review-stars \{ color: var(--gold); font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-top: 2px; \}\
\
/* badge \'97 \uc0\u1502 \u1488 \u1493 \u1491  \u1506 \u1491 \u1497 \u1503  */\
.review-badge \{\
  font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; padding: 2px 8px;\
  border-radius: 100px; flex-shrink: 0; color: var(--muted);\
\}\
.review-badge.verified \{ color: rgba(34,197,94,0.6); \}\
\
/* \uc0\u1502 \u1493 \u1510 \u1512  \'97 \u1500 \u1500 \u1488  \u1512 \u1511 \u1506  \u1495 \u1494 \u1511  */\
.review-product \{\
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;\
  font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted);\
  padding-bottom: 12px;\
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);\
\}\
.review-product svg \{ width: 12px; height: 12px; stroke: var(--muted); flex-shrink: 0; \}\
.review-product strong \{ color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); font-weight: 500; \}\
\
/* \uc0\u1496 \u1511 \u1505 \u1496  \'97 \u1502 \u1512 \u1499 \u1494  \u1492 \u1506 \u1504 \u1497 \u1497 \u1503  */\
.review-text \{\
  font-size: 14px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);\
  line-height: 1.75; font-weight: 400;\
\}\
.review-text strong \{ color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); font-weight: 500; \}\
\
/* \uc0\u1505 \u1497 \u1499 \u1493 \u1501  \'97 \u1504 \u1511 \u1497  \u1493 \u1502 \u1497 \u1504 \u1497 \u1502 \u1500 \u1497  */\
\
\
/* Animation */\
@keyframes fadeUp \{ from\{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px)\} to\{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)\} \}\
/* no jump animation on slides */\
